---
id: send-notification
title: "Send Notification"
description: "Send a notification for a Commit Request once it is processed successfully"

  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/commit/sendNotification/{commitRequestId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send a notification for a Commit Request once it is processed successfully

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
